senses.definition: a person who is related to someone by blood or marriage

examples.x: Uncle Joe is a distant relation on my mother's side.
He's a relation of the royal family, albeit distant.

senses.definition: any connection between people by kinship or marriage

examples.x: Despite living in different countries, they discovered a familial relationship through their shared great-great-grandfather.
Their relationship can be traced back to their great-grandparents who were siblings.
The family reunion was a chance for relatives to reminisce about their shared relationships going back several generations.
The family tree revealed unexpected relationships between branches that hadn't communicated for decades.
Even though they grew up continents apart, they share a strong sense of kinship due to their familial relationship.

senses.definition: a close relationship between two or more people characterized by trust, loyalty, and support

examples.x: The bond of friendship between Jack and Jill was so strong that they could communicate without uttering a single word.
Despite their differences, their friendship endured because they respected and valued each other's perspectives.
In times of need, true friendship shines through with unwavering support and understanding.
Their friendship has endured since childhood, built on trust and shared experiences.
Despite living miles apart, their friendship remains strong thanks to regular calls and visits.

senses.definition: the state of being a mother to a child or children

examples.x: She embraced motherhood with love and dedication, cherishing every moment with her child.
Motherhood brought her a sense of fulfillment she had never known before.
Despite the challenges, she navigated the journey of motherhood with grace and determination.
Through the highs and lows of motherhood, she found strength in the bond with her children.
Motherhood taught her the importance of patience, empathy, and selflessness.

senses.definition: the state of being a father to a child or children

examples.x: He embraced fatherhood with open arms, eager to provide and protect his family.
Fatherhood brought him a newfound sense of purpose and joy.
Despite his busy schedule, he always made time for his children, embracing the joys of fatherhood.
His approach to fatherhood was rooted in love, guidance, and unwavering support.
Fatherhood challenged him to be the best version of himself for the sake of his children.

senses.definition: a family member who is related to us by blood or marriage

examples.x: My grandparents, aunts, uncles, and cousins are all my relatives.
We invited all our relatives to the family reunion.
She's a distant relative on my father's side.
In times of need, relatives often come together to support one another.
Despite living far away, we keep in touch with our relatives through video calls.

senses.definition: the formal and legal relationship between two people who are married

examples.x: Counseling and communication are essential for a successful marriage.
They celebrated their 25th anniversary of marriage with a grand party.
In many cultures, marriage is considered a lifelong commitment.
Legal documents are often required to validate a marriage.
They exchanged vows in a beautiful ceremony to signify their marriage.

senses.definition: not having a legal or official romantic partner

examples.x: Despite being in a long-term relationship, they remained unmarried.
She chose to remain unmarried and focus on her career.
He's currently unmarried but hopes to find a partner someday.
The census data includes information about both married and unmarried individuals.
Many unmarried couples choose to cohabit without formalizing their relationship through marriage.

senses.definition: having formally agreed to marry someone

examples.x: The engaged couple spent months planning their wedding.
The engaged pair looked forward to building a life together.
The engaged couple often talked about their hopes and dreams for their future together.

senses.definition: not living with one's spouse or partner anymore

examples.x: The separated couple attended counseling sessions to work through their issues.
The separated parents maintained an amicable relationship for the sake of their children.
The separated spouses divided their assets and agreed on custody arrangements for their children.

senses.definition: a woman who is about to be married or has recently been married

examples.x: The bride walked down the aisle, radiant in her white wedding gown, as the guests looked on with admiration.
The bride and groom exchanged rings as a symbol of their everlasting love and devotion to each other.
Family and friends gathered to shower the bride with flowers and well wishes as she embarked on her journey into married life.
After the ceremony, the groom lifted his bride's veil and kissed her tenderly, sealing their vows of love and commitment.
The bride’s parents were very proud as she exchanged vows.

senses.definition: a man who is getting married

examples.x: The groom looked dashing in his tailored suit as he waited at the altar.
The groom's family hosted a traditional ceremony to celebrate his upcoming marriage.
As the groom, he felt a mix of nervousness and excitement on his wedding day.
The groom exchanged heartfelt vows with his bride, sealing their commitment to each other.
After the wedding ceremony, the groom thanked everyone for their love and support.

senses.definition: a male or female partner in a marriage

examples.x: He introduced his spouse as his rock and closest confidant.
In many cultures, spouses exchange vows as a symbol of their commitment to each other.
The law provides certain rights and responsibilities to spouses.
Despite their differences, they support each other as devoted spouses.

senses.definition: a person who raises a child or children without a partner

examples.x: As a single parent, she works hard to provide for her children and give them the best possible life.
Single parents often face unique challenges balancing work, childcare, and personal responsibilities.
Despite the difficulties, many single parents find fulfillment in raising their children on their own.
The community rallied around the single parent, offering support and assistance during tough times.
Single parents often juggle multiple roles, acting as both mother and father to their children.

senses.definition: a person who has no siblings

examples.x: As an only child, he received undivided attention from his parents.
Being an only child, she grew up accustomed to solitude but cherished the close bond with her parents.
Some only children long for siblings while others cherish the unique experience of being the only child.
Despite being an only child, he developed strong social skills and friendships outside the family circle.

senses.definition: a chart, showing the relationship between all the members of a family over a long period of time

examples.x: She spent hours researching her family tree, uncovering generations of ancestors.
The family tree revealed interesting connections between distant relatives.
Creating a family tree helped her understand her heritage and ancestry.
The family gathered around to update the family tree with new additions and branches.
Some family trees include photographs and stories to bring the ancestors to life.

senses.definition: someone who is the mother of a person's wife or husband

examples.x: Despite initial apprehensions, she and her mother-in-law developed a strong bond over the years.
She has a close and loving relationship with her mother-in-law.
Her mother-in-law welcomed her into the family with open arms.
They spent the weekend visiting her mother-in-law, enjoying quality family time together.
Her mother-in-law offered invaluable advice and support during difficult times.

senses.definition: someone who is the father of a person's wife or husband

examples.x: He has a great relationship with his father-in-law, often bonding over shared interests.
Their father-in-law welcomed him into the family with warmth and kindness.
He and his father-in-law enjoy fishing together on weekends.
His father-in-law is a source of wisdom and guidance in both personal and professional matters.
His father-in-law helped him with home repairs, teaching him valuable skills along the way.

senses.definition: the person who is the sister of one's spouse

examples.x: She has a close relationship with her sister-in-law, often confiding in her like a sister.
Her sister-in-law became her best friend after she married her brother.
Her sister-in-law provided invaluable support during her pregnancy and early motherhood.
They surprised their sister-in-law with a birthday party to show their appreciation and love.
She and her sister-in-law enjoy shopping trips and spa days together, strengthening their sisterly bond.

senses.definition: the person who is the brother of one's spouse

examples.x: He has a great relationship with his brother-in-law, often sharing jokes and interests.
His brother-in-law became like a brother to him after he married his sister.
They celebrated holidays together with their brother-in-law, creating lasting family traditions.
His brother-in-law helped him move into his new apartment, showcasing their strong bond.
They surprised their brother-in-law with tickets to his favorite sports game as a birthday present.

senses.definition: the wife of one's daughter or son

examples.x: She has a close and loving relationship with her daughter-in-law, treating her like her own daughter.
Her daughter-in-law is a wonderful addition to the family, bringing joy and laughter to gatherings.
They welcomed their daughter-in-law into the family with open arms, making her feel loved and appreciated.
Her daughter-in-law is a caring and supportive partner to their son, making them proud as parents.
Her daughter-in-law often helps out with household chores, easing the burden and strengthening their relationship.

senses.definition: the husband of one's son or daughter

examples.x: He has a great relationship with his son-in-law, considering him a true member of the family.
Their son-in-law is a wonderful addition to the family, bringing laughter and happiness to gatherings.
They welcomed their son-in-law with open arms, embracing him as part of their family from the start.
His son-in-law is a devoted husband to their daughter, earning their admiration and gratitude.
His son-in-law often helps with household projects, strengthening their relationship and fostering teamwork.

senses.definition: ‌the parents of one's spouse

examples.x: He has a warm and loving relationship with his parents-in-law, considering them his own family.
They often spend holidays with their parents-in-law, creating cherished memories as a blended family.
Despite living in different cities, they make an effort to visit their parents-in-law regularly.
His parents-in-law provided invaluable support and guidance during challenging times.
His parents-in-law treat him like a son, welcoming him into their family with open arms.

senses.definition: a group of people belonging to a particular age group or time period partaking in a certain activity

examples.x: The new generation of entrepreneurs is utilizing technology to revolutionize industries worldwide.
This restaurant is run by a new generation of chefs who are passionate about incorporating sustainable practices into their culinary creations.
A new generation of scientists is working tirelessly to address pressing global challenges, such as climate change and disease prevention.

senses.definition: to leave someone with no intention of returning

examples.x: Sarah felt a deep sense of pain when her parents decided to abandon her.
In the middle of a crucial project, Sarah's colleague decided to abandon the team without any explanation.
When Jessica needed support the most, her supposed best friend chose to abandon her.
Mark was devastated when his partner suddenly abandoned him.

senses.definition: to look after a child until they reach maturity

examples.x: As a single parent, she worked hard to bring up her son.
The aunt helped bring up her nephew after his parents passed away.
It's essential to bring up a child in an environment that fosters both learning and creativity.

senses.definition: to be sexually unfaithful to one's partner by engaging in romantic or intimate activities with someone else

examples.x: Some couples seek therapy to address the issues that may lead one partner to cheat.
The couple decided to part ways after it was revealed that one of them had cheated.
Maintaining open communication is essential in preventing the temptation to cheat in a relationship.

senses.definition: to abandon one's wife, husband, or partner with no plan of returning

examples.x: After years of unhappiness, she decided to leave her husband.
He left his wife and children without warning.
He left his wife for another woman.
I couldn't bring myself to confess because I feared you would leave me.
You can always count on me; I won't ever leave you.

senses.definition: to end the relationship or live apart from a partner

examples.x: After years of struggling, they decided to separate and pursue different paths.
The couple mutually agreed to separate, realizing they had grown apart over time.
Some couples choose to separate temporarily to reassess their relationship.

senses.definition: sharing a strong and intimate bond

examples.x: They have a close friendship that has lasted for years.
Despite their busy schedules, they make time for each other, maintaining their close friendship.
The couple had a close partnership, built on trust and mutual respect.
Their close relationship made them inseparable, both in good times and bad.

senses.definition: being connected through family ties or marriage
an immediate and intense romantic attraction that one feels upon seeing someone for the first time

examples.x: A third of dog owners have experienced love at first sight when setting eyes on their dog.
It was love at first sight when they met, but it didn't last long.
Their eyes met across the crowded room, and it was love at first sight.
Some say love at first sight is just a myth, but for them, it was a reality.
